decks.notes: The deck focuses on tutoring and utilizing a variety of creatures with different abilities to create powerful combos and synergies. It uses cards like Green Sun's Zenith and Chord of Calling to search for key creatures such as Yawgmoth, Thran Physician and Walking Ballista. Agatha's Soul Cauldron and Malevolent Rumble provide additional creature support and control elements. The deck also includes cards like Delighted Halfling and Strangleroot Geist for additional aggressiveness and resilience. The goal is to create a toolbox of creatures that can be utilized strategically to outmaneuver opponents and secure victory.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly deploying aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls to put pressure on the opponent. It also utilizes burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment to clear blockers and finish off the opponent. The inclusion of Seasoned Pyromancer and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah provides card advantage and additional threats. The deck aims to win games quickly through a combination of creature damage and burn spells, while also having some protection with cards like Arena of Glory and Thraben Charm.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly building a board presence with efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Ocelot Pride. It also includes burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment to push through damage and control the board. The inclusion of Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Arena of Glory provide additional ways to buff your creatures and close out the game quickly. The deck also has some utility cards like Ranger-Captain of Eos and Thraben Charm to help deal with opposing threats and protect your own creatures. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast, aggressive creatures and burn spells.

The deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures and then bringing them back into play for a devastating combo. It utilizes cards like Faithless Looting and Thought Scour to discard creatures like Archon of Cruelty and Emperor of Bones, then reanimating them with cards like Persist and Unearth. The key strategy is to overwhelm the opponent with big creatures while disrupting their hand with cards like Thoughtseize and Spell Pierce. The deck aims to win through a combination of graveyard recursion and creature beatdown.

This deck focuses on aggressive plays with a mix of creatures and spells to put pressure on the opponent quickly. It includes powerful cards like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah to push for damage. The deck also has support cards like Goblin Bombardment and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer to deal additional damage. It uses a mixture of white and red mana sources to cast its spells efficiently. The inclusion of cards like Mana Tithe and Ranger-Captain of Eos adds disruption and protection to the aggressive game plan.

The deck focuses on using instant speed reanimation spells like Goryo's Vengeance and Solitude to cheat out powerful creatures like Griselbrand or Atraxa, Grand Unifier. The deck also includes cards like Ephemerate and Psychic Frog to control the board and disrupt opponents' strategies. The key strategy is to quickly reanimate threats and overwhelm the opponent before they can establish their game plan. The deck includes a mix of control elements, removal, and reanimation spells to create a disruptive and powerful combo deck.

This deck focuses on combining aggressive creatures with blink effects to maintain pressure on the opponent while also providing versatility and disruption through removal spells and card draw. The strategy is to quickly build a board presence with creatures like Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer, then protect them with cards like Solitude and Consign to Memory. Quantum Riddler can generate card advantage while March of Otherworldly Light can provide additional damage and evasion. Overall, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of speed, resilience, and control elements.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly fill up the graveyard with powerful creatures, such as Archon of Cruelty and Emperor of Bones, using cards like Faithless Looting and Thoughtseize. Once the graveyard is full, the deck uses reanimation spells like Persist and Unearth to bring these creatures back onto the battlefield for a devastating combo. Cards like Spell Pierce and Fatal Push help to control the game in the early turns, while other cards like Psychic Frog and Abhorrent Oculus provide additional value. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with powerful reanimated creatures and control elements.

The main idea of this deck is to quickly and efficiently reanimate powerful creatures like Griselbrand using cards such as Goryo's Vengeance and Quantum Riddler. By using cheap instant spells like Ephemerate and Faithful Mending, the deck can control the game while setting up the combo. The deck also features disruption in the form of Thoughtseize and Force of Negation to protect the combo. With a mix of card draw, reanimation spells, and control elements, this deck aims to quickly bring out powerful threats and overwhelm the opponent.

The deck focuses on quickly deploying artifacts onto the battlefield to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive threats. The key strategy involves utilizing cards like Urza's Saga and Mox Opal to quickly generate mana and cards like Kappa Cannoneer and Pinnacle Emissary to apply pressure. Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Metallic Rebuke provide additional utility and disruption. Engineered Explosives and Tormod's Crypt help control the board, while cards like Shadowspear and Claws of Gix provide additional versatility. The deck aims to win the game quickly through a combination of efficient creatures and disruptive spells.

The main focus of this Boros Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. The key strategy is to establish a strong board presence early on with cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, while using burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment to control the board and deal direct damage to the opponent. The inclusion of cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Ocelot Pride provide additional support and synergy within the deck to maintain pressure on the opponent and secure a swift victory.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on utilizing powerful creatures like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer, along with burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment to quickly reduce the opponent's life total. The deck also includes disruption elements like Ranger-Captain of Eos and removal spells like Path to Exile to control the board. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Ocelot Pride and Voice of Victory provides additional creature support and buffs. The deck aims to maintain early game pressure and finish off the opponent before they can stabilize.

This deck focuses on using Basking Broodscale's ability to trigger powerful effects like Blade of the Bloodchief and Malevolent Rumble, while also utilizing ramp from Eldrazi Temple and Urza's Saga to quickly bring out powerful threats like Emrakul, the Promised End. The deck includes a variety of artifact and creature interactions to control the board and disrupt the opponent's game plan, ultimately leading to a swift victory through a combination of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize the Allosaurus Rider and Summoner's Pact combo to cheat out powerful creatures like Griselbrand, Ghalta, and Atraxa quickly. The deck also includes cards like Neoform and Eldritch Evolution to tutor for key pieces, as well as protection in Veil of Summer and Pact of Negation. The inclusion of cards like Ureni, the Song Unending and Disciple of Freyalise provide additional support and alternative win conditions. The deck aims to ramp quickly and overwhelm the opponent with big creatures and explosive plays.

The main concept of this deck is to use a combination of powerful spells and creatures to quickly disrupt the opponent and control the game until the player can assemble their combo pieces. The deck focuses on utilizing cards such as Goblin Charbelcher and Lotus Bloom to generate mana and deal huge amounts of damage in a single turn. By carefully managing resources and using cards like Force of Negation and Disrupting Shoal to protect key pieces, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and secure victory.

The key concept of this UR Aggro deck is to aggressively deal damage to the opponent using efficient low-cost spells and creatures. The deck aims to quickly assemble a board presence with cards like Monastery Swiftspear and Dragon's Rage Channeler, while also utilizing burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart to finish off the opponent. The deck also includes card draw and selection to maintain consistency and keep up the pressure on the opponent. Overall, the deck prioritizes speed and direct damage to overwhelm the opponent and secure a quick victory.
